thread.content:
Compliance Control of the Week: AC-3 — Access Enforcement

Family: Access Control

Only the right people can access the right things. Sounds obvious? 60% of breaches involve access control failures.

AC-3 maps to 6 frameworks:

SOC 2: CC6.1
CMMC: AC.L2-3.1.2
FedRAMP: AC-3
HIPAA: 164.312(a)
PCI-DSS: Req-7.2
ISO 27001: A.8.3

One vulnerability can trigger findings across all of them. That's why mapping matters.

Related weaknesses: CWE-284, CWE-285, CWE-862

If your scanner finds any of these CWEs, AC-3 is the compliance control your auditor cares about.

Most tools show the CVE. We show which controls it threatens.

Map your vulnerabilities to AC-3 and 64+ other controls automatically.

Free CLI: npx @cveriskpilot/scan@latest
Platform: https://cveriskpilot.com/signup?ref=x-cotw

#ComplianceAutomation #AC #NIST80053
